text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #2)
That does indeed sound like the proper way in principle. However, the commit in question would be https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=aa2769119334a5045d38419995aca597ea24b1f1 , making that a rather daunting task. But I'll see what I can do.
